headline: Is PPL Emerging as a Key Beneficiary of the AI and Data Center Boom?
summary: PPL sees AI data centers drive power demand in Pennsylvania and Kentucky, with 10 GW signed and a $23B grid upgrade plan to fuel growth.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Dominion Energy, Lowers Price Target to $66
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   maintains Dominion Energy (NYSE:D) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $67 to $66.

headline: Regulatory Hurdles Await Massive NextEra, Dominion Energy Merger
